/usr/bin/ar qc liblacam2.a CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/cem_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/cem_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/cluster_aware_pibt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/cluster_detection_pibt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/cluster_pibt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/clustered_hnode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/clustered_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/collision_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/dist_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/hnode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/instance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/lacam2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/odplanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/pibt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/pibt_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/policy_pibt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/post_processing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/random_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/refiner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/scatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/sipp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/translator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lacam2.dir/src/wplanner.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblacam2.a
